decision.reason: 宝宝靠近床沿探身，存在跌落风险，需要立即干预

description: Rule-based video progress entered the dangerous_action stage. This PoC trigger validates the AI safety closed-loop path.

voice_command.text: Baby, stay safe. Please move back to the middle of the crib.

notification_command.fallback: If unread for 60 seconds, escalate to SMS or phone call.
